name: Cringelord
description: A cursed creature born from expired memes and WiFi radiation. Lives in your parents' basement. Has never touched grass. Its cry sounds like a TikTok notification at 3am.

moves.name: 💬 Ratio
moves.desc: Posts 'ratio' with no context. Deals massive psychic damage. 40% chance the opponent simply doesn't recover emotionally.

moves.name: 😐 Sigma Stare
moves.desc: Stares into the opponent's soul while 'Bury the Light' plays in the background. No thoughts. Head empty. Lowkey hits different.

moves.name: 🌿 Touch Grass
moves.desc: Cringelord reluctantly goes outside. The sun heals them but it physically hurts. Restores 25 HP but leaves a burn debuff on self.

moves.name: 🧠 NPC Arc
moves.desc: Enters main character mode. Puts on a playlist, walks in slow motion, sharply raises ATK. Absolutely nobody asked.

moves.name: 🎮 Skill Issue
moves.desc: Tells the opponent 'skill issue' while losing. Lowers opponent's defense stat through sheer condescension.

moves.name: ✨ It's Giving Chaos
moves.desc: Slaps the opponent with a chaotic aura that's giving unhinged energy. May poison AND confuse. No further explanation.
